zh.Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾斯尼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fitzrandolph於1420年出生在英國越可爾斯尼恩時，他的父親Sir John FitzRandolph22歲，母親Juliana Brown39歲。他於大約1439年與Joan Conyers在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在英國越可爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯尼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fitzrandolph于1420年出生在英国越可爾斯尼恩时，他的父亲Sir John FitzRandolph22岁，母亲Juliana Brown39岁。他于大约1439年与Joan Conyers在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年在英国越可爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯尼恩。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fitzrandolph was born in 1420, in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John FitzRandolph, was 22 and his mother, Juliana Brown, was 39. He married Joan Conyers about 1439, in Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1475, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fitzrandolph est né en 1420, à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzRandolph, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Juliana Brown, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Joan Conyers environ 1439, à Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1475, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Fitzrandolph 1420 in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John FitzRandolph 22 und seine Mutter Juliana Brown 39. Er hat um 1439 in Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzrandolph è nato il nel 1420 nel Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John FitzRandolph, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Brown, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Joan Conyers circa 1439, nel Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, United: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルン
ja.lifeSummary: John Fitzrandolphが1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルンで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzRandolphは22歳，母Juliana Brownは39歳であった。約1439年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスペニソルンでJoan Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 커k비 인 애스h필드
ko.lifeSummary: John Fitzrandolph(이)가 1420년 영국 요르크실르 스펜이토른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John FitzRandolph(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Brown(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스펜이토른에서 Joan Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 요르크실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스펜이토른에 묻혔다.

pt.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fitzrandolph nasceu em 1420, em Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzRandolph, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Brown, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Conyers aproximadamente 1439, em Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1475, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: киркби ин ашфиелд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fitzrandolph родился в 1420 г. в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John FitzRandolph было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Brown, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Conyers около 1439 г. в местности спеннитаурн, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fitzrandolph nació en 1420, en Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzRandolph, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Juliana Brown, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Joan Conyers aproximadamente 1439, en Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1475, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
